data.content:
Done. Here's what was modernized:

**Legacy patterns removed:**

| Pattern | Why it's unnecessary in SDK-style |
|---------|----------------------------------|
| `ToolsVersion` + XML namespace | SDK attribute replaces both |
| Manual `Import` of `.props`/`.targets` | SDK handles these implicitly |
| `Configuration`/`Platform` conditions | SDK provides sensible defaults for Debug/Release |
| `ProjectGuid` | Not needed by modern tooling |
| `OutputType Library` | SDK default is already `Library` |
| `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects` | SDK defaults |
| Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` | SDK globs all `.cs` files automatically |
| `<Reference Include="System.*">` | Implicit with .NET Framework targeting |
| `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | Assembly metadata now set via `<PropertyGroup>` properties |
| Debug/Release property groups | SDK defaults match these exactly |

**Result:** 47 lines → 13 lines. The `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` file was deleted since its metadata is now expressed as MSBuild properties (`Description`, `Company`, `Copyright`, `Version`).
